title: verbena caroliniana
intro: Verbena caroliniana, also known as Carolina verbena, is a perennial herb native to the southeastern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Verbena caroliniana include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and skin conditions.
